Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows significant renal impairment (elevated creatinine, proteinuria, microalbuminuria), metabolic acidosis (low CO₂), and abnormal urine findings (cloudy, brown, low specific gravity, protein, bilirubin, ketones). LDL cholesterol is elevated, increasing cardiovascular risk. HbA1c is low, possibly due to anemia or recent hypoglycemia. Recommend urgent nephrology evaluation and further assessment for underlying causes of renal dysfunction and urine abnormalities.
